meaning: Sequential index of the selected reconstructed event in the FOCAL tree.
One-based raw 32-byte line number of the physical trigger that starts this event.
Most frequent sample cluster length selected for this reconstruction; each required lpGBT must have a cluster with this length.
True when sample clusters were selected using only samples whose four elinks pass CRC.
Number of lpGBTs stored in this event entry.
lpGBT identifier for each lpGBT stored in this entry.
Number of samples stored for each lpGBT; usually equal to peak_cluster_length.
Start index of each lpGBT payload block in tc/tp/val0/val1/val2.
Number of payload values stored for each lpGBT; n_samples * 38 payload rows * 4 elinks.
Start index of each lpGBT sample block in sample_timestamp and in per-sample elink metadata.
First timestamp of each stored sample
Raw line offset from trigger_line to the first L1A FCMD data line for each lpGBT; uint32 max means not found.
Number of L1A FCMD data lines found for each lpGBT within this event.
TC bit payload values
TP bit payload values
ADC val0 payload values
ADC val1 payload values
ADC val2 payload values
Raw sample header word for each sample and elink; zero if no header was decoded.
CRC word read from each sample and elink.
CRC value recomputed by the decoder for each sample and elink.
CRC status for each sample and elink; 1 means pass and 0 means fail.
